## Step 5 — ATDD Checklist Scan

| Story | [x] Checked | [ ] Unchecked | [~] Deferred | Automatable % |
|-------|-------------|---------------|--------------|---------------|
| 3-1-2 | 44 | 0 | 0 | 100% |
| 3-2-1 | 49 | 0 | 0 | 100% |
| 3-3-1 | 33 | 0 | 16 | 100% (33/33 automatable) |
| 3-3-2 | 35 | 0 | 10 | 100% (35/35 automatable) |
| 3-4-1 | 54 | 0 | 0 | 100% |
| 3-4-2 | 48 | 0 | 0 | 100% |
| 7-1-2 | 45 | 0 | 0 | 100% |

All deferred `[~]` items are explicitly blocked by EPIC-2 (windows.h PCH dependency prevents MuTests execution on macOS/Linux) and are documented with blocking rationale. These are excluded from the ATDD_GAP calculation per the `[~]` convention.

The one `[ ]` item in 7-1-2 (AC-VAL-1, manual crash test) appears in the AC-to-Test Mapping table, not the Implementation Checklist — it is not a checklist checkbox but a table cell, and is correctly documented as non-automatable due to `_exit()` process termination.

**Result:** 0 ATDD_GAP gaps.

The sprint has met all its story commitments. Consider running `sprint-complete` to:
1. Set `sprint-3.status` to `complete`
2. Record `velocity`, `delivered_points`, and `commitment_reliability`
3. Archive the sprint event log

---

## Workflow Quick Reference

| Gap Type | Suggested Workflow |
|----------|--------------------|
| BLOCKER | `dev-story` (resume to address blocker) |
| USER_ACTION | Manual intervention (describe specific action) |
| AC_FAIL | `ac-validation` (re-run AC tests with auto-fix) |
| ATDD_GAP | `dev-story` (resume to complete unchecked items) |
| IN_PROGRESS | `dev-story --from DEV_STORY` (continue from where stopped) |
| STALLED | `./paw {story-key}` (auto-resume from detected step) |
| STRUCT_MISS | Depends on missing artifact (create-story, testarch-atdd, etc.) |
| FEEDBACK | `./paw {story-key}` (pipeline will consume feedback and retry) |
| PHANTOM | `./paw {story-key} --from DEV_STORY` (re-implement missing tasks) |
| PLACEHOLDER | `./paw {story-key} --from DEV_STORY` (replace stub code) |
| REACH_ORPHAN | `bootstrap-reachability` (retrofit catalogs with cross-references) |
| BOOT_FAIL | `dev-story` (fix startup failures — DI, config, migration) |
| TEST_ANTIPATTERN | `enforce-e2e-test-quality` mode=fix (scan and fix anti-patterns) |
| CONTRACT_BREAK | `schema-alignment` (re-align catalogs with implementation) |
| PEN_DRIFT | `design-screen` + `validate-pen-compliance` (re-sync with .pen) |
